titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Debate Association Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday March 15, 2021 at 08:16

did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, annual reports, budget and accounting records, rosters, memoranda, photographs and general administrative records concerning the activities of Rollin G. Osterweis as director of the Yale Debate Association.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 40 (YRG 40), Records of Yale clubs, societies, and organizations.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Debate Association Records (RU 75). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are aranged in two series: I. Correspondence, 1948-1974. II. Subject Files, 1948-1980; and subsequent accessions.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Yale Debate Association was founded in 1908.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, annual reports, budget and accounting records, rosters, memoranda, photographs and general administrative records concerning the activities of Rollin G. Osterweis as director of the Yale Debate Association.

did.unittitle: Memorandum to the Dean of Yale Collegeregarding the Debating and Public SpeakingProgram at Yale
Osterweis, Rollin G, Biography; corrected and final
Photographs of the Yale Debate Association
Manuscript (unpublished) of Rollin Osterweis, "American Oratory in Historical Perspective"
Obituary and newsclippings re: documentary "Freedom to Speak" about Rollin Osterweis (1983)
1948-1949 (Bunden, Buckley, hadley, Osterweis, Shapiro, Looper, Chatiman?)
Memorial service leaflet for Rollin Gustav Osterweis
Centennial reunion of the Yale Debate Association program of events
Yale Debate Association centennial roster of attendees
Constitution of the Yale Inter-College Debate League

unittitle.emph: The Guide to North American Platform Debate

did.unittitle: Manual for Debate, perpared by the Intercollege Debate League
photocopied article from The Gavel written by Rollin Osterweis
Scrapbook documenting Rollin Osterweis and the Yale Debate Association
Scrapbook documenting Rollin Osterweis and the Yale Debate Association
